svg.text: Heap Sort Phase 1: Build the Max-Heap
Rearrange the array so every parent is larger than its children
A binary tree stored in an array. Parent of index i has children at 2i+1 (left) and 2i+2 (right).
Max-heap rule: every parent must be ≥ both its children. The largest value ends up at data[0].
Heapify bottom-up: start at last non-leaf [2], work toward root [0]
Heapify [0] = 38. Children: 95, 43. Swap with 95. Then 38 sinks: children 55, 62. Swap with 62.
